content.en:
After that, Ye Tian supported again and again, but he could only support ordinary nodes, like the battlefield where the Su Domain Lord was located, that was the real terror, and it was useless for him to support in the past.

Although he has now comprehended the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao, his cultivation is very low after all, even if he has not broken through the previous Su Domain Lord, he is probably not an opponent.

If you encounter an eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon with a supreme bloodline, even if you comprehend the sixth sequence of supreme path rules, and do not master the fifth sequence of supreme path rules, you can kill him in seconds.

His strength is nothing in this tribulation, even if it is the Ninefold Dao Realm, it may fall.

So.

Ye Tian can only do his best, and he will support if he can.

After a period of time, the losses of the Supreme Dao Void Demons were not small, and many powerful Supreme Dao Void Demons were not lightly injured, so they retreated.

This wave of attacks is over!

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

A large number of Supreme Dao Realms are healing, and there are many Supreme Dao Realms that are on the verge of death and have lost the ability to heal themselves, but other Supreme Dao Realms have no time to heal, so they are sealed one by one.

I saw that in an area, the dense Supreme Dao Realm was sealed here, waiting for the back to slowly heal and unseal.

Ye Tian, as the commander of the Winter Night Fortress, knew a little about it, and he knew how heavy the losses of this wave of Winter Night Fortress were, just the Seventh Rank Dao Realm, eight hundred and sixty-three, and the Eightfold Dao Realm, three fell.

There is no one to count those weak Supreme Dao realms, there are really too many of them, and the statistics are meaningless.

"Cannon fodder!"

Ye Tian presented this word in his mind.

Those triple, quadruple, and fivefold supreme realms are cannon fodder in such a war, and even the sevenfold supreme realm is just a little bigger cannon fodder.

This is also the reason why the Taisu Palace Lord and they want to rebel against the Wuji Heavenly Palace, if the Wuji Heavenly Palace still controls the Wuji Domain, they will directly pull the Taisu Palace's Sevenfold Dao Realm and Sixfold Dao Realm over as cannon fodder.

In that case, Taisu Palace will be tantamount to destruction.

Now, although the Taisu Palace has also sent the Sevenfold Dao Realm over, the foundation is still there, even if the Taisu Palace Lord falls, it will only lose part of its strength.

What Ye Tian can do is to try to keep them as much as possible, so that they don't fall as much as possible, that's all.

The next wave of attacks by the Void Demons won't be so fast, after all, they need to heal their wounds, or send reinforcements to come over, before they invade the Winter Night Fortress again.

this day.

Winter Night Fortress High-Level Meeting.

The Su Domain Lord of the Winter Night Fortress and several other domain masters came, as well as the Winter Night Fortress Fortress Lord, the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm also appeared.

However, the strength of the Fortress Master of the Winter Night Fortress is not as strong as that of the Lord of the Su Domain.

Ye Tian and a few commanders were also present.

At this time, the Winter Night Fortress Lord Xing Ling spoke: "Everyone, the Winter Night Fortress has now repelled the first wave of attacks, but it will face attacks again and again, so the situation is still very serious. And in this battle, there is a domain master who has fallen, so now we have to choose a new domain master!"

The Domain Lord has fallen!

Many commanders were shocked, they only knew that a few Eightfold Dao Realms had fallen, but they didn't expect that a domain master had fallen.

Before the Winter Night Fortress, there were a total of nine domain masters, all of whom were cultivated to the peak of the eightfold Dao realm, and the sixth sequence of the Dao rules were all above the ninety percent realm, and their combat effectiveness was very strong, maybe their strength was not as good as that of the Su domain master, but they were all very good.

The fall of a domain lord is indeed a huge loss.

Those commanders knew their strength, and it was impossible for them to be qualified to serve as domain masters, but there were several people in the Eightfold Dao Realm of the Winter Night Fortress who were in other positions, but there was still a lot of gap between them and the strength of the domain masters.

"This time the domain master, I recommend Ye Tian!"

Lord Su said.

The Sai Lord Xingling also looked at Ye Tian, "I also think Ye Tian is very good, Ye Tian has killed an Eightfold Supreme Dao in this support, and the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm has reached more than a hundred, his strength is very strong, and he is definitely qualified to serve as a domain master." "

If it was a normal time, the other Eightfold Supreme Dao Realms would definitely compete with Ye Tian for the outside of the domain master, but now there is a rare one to fight.

Once you become a domain owner, you have more responsibility, which is not a good thing!

Why did the previous domain master fall? If you stay in other nodes, you will definitely not have an accident, but if you stay in the most important position, you will naturally encounter fierce attacks, many eightfold supreme Dao Void Demons besiege, and you may even encounter the attack and killing of the Ninefold Dao Void Demons.

This time, the domain lord fell, that is, he was killed in an instant by a ninefold Dao Void Demon who was good at assassination, and the Su domain lord and the star Ling Sai lord had no time to rescue.

That's why they don't want to be domain masters!

Of course, there are also advantages to being a domain owner, such as resource treatment, which are not comparable to other positions.

Once the Winter Night Fortress is held, the benefits of sharing after the war are over are unimaginable.

But only if it can be fired!

"Thank you, Lord Sai!"

Ye Tianying stepped down from the position of domain master.

Announcing a new domain master is just one thing, there are many other things to be announced.

I saw the Su Domain Lord say: "This time, many fortresses under the command of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance have been attacked, and three of them have been breached! At present, the Innate Origin Alliance is trying to find a way to recapture the fortresses, and then incorporate the Innate Origin Domains managed by those fortresses into other fortresses, so as to ensure that those Innate Origin Domains will not be swallowed." "

"Three fortresses breached?"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

This is the first wave of attacks, and three fortresses have been lost, if time passes, after 10,000 Dao eras, how many fortresses will be breached?

Ye Tian didn't care about the other Origin Domains, but he had to ensure that the Infinite Domain was not breached.

According to this trend, the next invasion of the Supreme Void Demons, the losses of the Winter Night Fortress will be even more severe.

He had to do something.

So, Ye Tian said: "Lord Stopper, Lord Su Domain, I have the ability of clones, and I am ready to let the four clones sit in the four fortress nodes and hide them." The next time they attacked, I would go all out and hit them out of reach, trying to kill many of them as well as a large number of Sevenfold Supreme Void Demons. "

The Lord of the Su Domain was slightly surprised, she had investigated Ye Tian, and Ye Tian had a clone, but the specific situation was not clear, she didn't expect Ye Tian to have four clones, which was amazing.

"Ye Domain Lord, what is the strength of your four clones?"

Lord Su asked.

"Ontology combat power!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ontology combat power!"

The Lord of the Su Domain was overjoyed, in this case, it would be equivalent to four more eightfold Dao realm combat power, and it was not an ordinary eightfold Dao realm combat power.

The other Eightfold Supreme Dao Realms and many Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms were overjoyed, and in this way, their pressure was reduced, and the chance of falling was smaller!
